IPUMS Immigration Outcomes — quick visual preview

This is a throwaway preview for the team meeting: one map, one trend chart, one ranking chart, and one breakdown. The final website can reuse the same design logic with better styling and linked interactions.

US-only ACS/IPUMS 2008–2024 weighted rates
Ranking uses the selected period. For gap topics, positive means foreign-born rate is higher; negative means lower.
Healthcare breakdown by citizenship group is included as an example of a topic-specific detailed view.
